# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

_format_version: "3.0"
_transform: true

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Request-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
        - X-RateLimit-Reset
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
    enabled: true

services:
  - name: api-service
    url: http://api-service.default.svc.cluster.local:8080
    plugins:
      - name: key-auth
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
          hide_credentials: true
          run_on_preflight: false
      - name: rate-limiting
        config:
          second: 20
          minute: 1000
          hour: 10000
          policy: local
          fault_tolerant: true
          hide_client_headers: false
    routes:
      - name: api-route
        paths:
          - /api
        strip_path: true
        plugins:
          - name: cors
            config:
              origins:
                - https://app.example.com
                - https://admin.example.com
              methods:
                - GET
                - POST
                - PUT
                - PATCH
                - DELETE
                - OPTIONS
              headers:
                - Authorization
                - Content-Type
                - Accept
                - Origin
                - X-Requested-With
                - X-Request-Id
              credentials: true
              max_age: 3600
          - name: rate-limiting
            config:
              second: 10
              minute: 300
              hour: 3000
              policy: local
              fault_tolerant: true
              hide_client_headers: false

consumers:
  - username: web-client
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: web-client-api-key
  - username: admin-client
    keyauth_credentials:
      - key: admin-client-api-key

vaults: []

plugins:
  - name: cors
    config:
      origins:
        - https://app.example.com
        - https://admin.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
        - PUT
        - PATCH
        - DELETE
        - OPTIONS
      headers:
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
        - Accept
        - Origin
        - X-Requested-With
        - X-Request-Id
      exposed_headers:
        - X-Request-Id
        - X-RateLimit-Limit
        - X-RateLimit-Remaining
        - X-RateLimit-Reset
      credentials: true
      max_age: 3600
  - name: rate-limiting
    config:
      second: 100
      minute: 5000
      hour: 50000
      policy: local
      fault_tolerant: true
      hide_client_headers: false
  - name: key-auth
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
      hide_credentials: true
      run_on_preflight: false
